task: Build the public Blue Life Commons ocean-life encyclopedia with every current animal entry wired to approved Vercel Blob-hosted imagery, rights metadata, source links, and production-ready verification.
surface: /species, /encyclopedia, /media-intelligence storage section, Vercel Blob media manifest, upload script, storage policy, navigation, sitemap, and storage runbook.
audience: Researchers, NGOs, educators, contributors, reviewers, partners, and public visitors who need a browsable animal encyclopedia with inspectable image provenance.
first_read: Blue Life Commons should be an image-first, source-led animal encyclopedia: current approved animals render real licensed or public-domain media from owned Vercel Blob URLs, while candidate media remains outside public routes.

references.label: Vercel Blob
references.reason: Primary public object storage and delivery layer for approved species images.

references.label: Vercel Blob SDK
references.reason: Upload behavior, public access, and Blob URL contract.

references.label: Vercel Blob CLI
references.reason: Store provisioning, project connection, and operational commands.

references.label: Vercel custom domains
references.reason: Official-domain setup path after the domain is owned or purchased.

references.label: Vercel add a domain
references.reason: Project domain assignment and verification workflow.

references.label: GitHub large file guidance
references.reason: Repo boundary: Git tracks metadata and manifests, not the bulk image library.

keep: Current public species pages remain source-led and citation-backed.
Only approved primary media enters public routes.
Vercel Blob is the first owned pixel store so the app is not hotlink-dependent for current approved animal images.
GitHub stores review truth, rights metadata, source URLs, checksums, and public manifests.
Official domain connection is documented but blocked until the domain is purchased or otherwise owned.
avoid: Using Google Images as a source of record.
Committing downloaded image binaries to Git.
Claiming domain ownership or official-domain production before DNS/project verification exists.
Overclaiming beyond the current 31 approved species records.
direction.signature: A real animal encyclopedia surface: visual-first browsing, guild grouping, source and rights tracking, Vercel-hosted image delivery, and a documented growth path for more animals.
system: content/media/species-media-blob-manifest.json records 31 uploaded approved image URLs in Vercel Blob.
lib/media.ts prefers Blob URLs for approved species media and falls back to approved source URLs only when needed.
components/species-encyclopedia.tsx renders the browsable public catalog for /species and /encyclopedia.
app/media-intelligence/page.tsx exposes the storage state and scale strategy.
scripts/upload_species_media_to_vercel_blob.mjs plans, uploads, and checks approved media without exposing secrets.
content/media/species-media-storage-policy.yaml defines the Vercel-Blob-first storage contract and later R2 scale option.

asset_quality.why_premium: The primary asset is the working production app surface backed by real approved species images, source metadata, and Vercel Blob delivery instead of decorative or generated animal art.

artifacts.notes: Image-first encyclopedia layout, guild navigation, rights/source chips, source links, and Blob-hosted indicators.
31 approved species image records uploaded to the connected Vercel Blob store.
Dry-run, upload, and check workflow for approved public species images.
Vercel-Blob-first architecture, official-domain blocker, cost posture, and later R2 option.
Desktop encyclopedia hero and visual catalog QA.
Mobile encyclopedia hero, stats, buttons, and first image QA after copy-overflow fix.
Desktop QA for the /encyclopedia alias route.
Desktop media intelligence route top-level coverage QA.
Tall desktop capture including the Blob/storage architecture section.

checks.name: standards-loaded
checks.evidence: Repo AGENTS, ethics/source/style/schema rules, Premium Web OS, asset intelligence, visual QA, and premium asset standards were read or applied through the current task context.

checks.name: asset-tier
checks.evidence: Tier A product-proof surface: public pages use real approved species media and Vercel Blob URLs, not generated animal placeholders.

checks.name: blob-upload
checks.evidence: npm run media:blob:upload uploaded 31 approved image originals to the blue-life-commons-media Vercel Blob store; npm run media:blob:check reports coverage for 31 approved species images.

checks.name: storage-manifest
checks.evidence: npm run media:storage:check reports the Vercel Blob storage manifest is up to date.

checks.name: content-integrity
checks.evidence: python scripts/validate_artifacts.py checked 71 artifacts with 0 errors; python scripts/lint_content.py reported 0 errors and 0 warnings.

checks.name: catalog-sync
checks.evidence: python scripts/sync_species_page_media.py --check and python scripts/build_catalog.py --check passed.

checks.name: typescript
checks.evidence: npm run lint passed after the encyclopedia and media plumbing changes.

checks.name: build
checks.evidence: npm run build generated /species, /encyclopedia, /media-intelligence, and all 31 species detail pages. The only warning is the known nonfatal Turbopack NFT trace warning through app/sitemap.ts and lib/content.ts.

checks.name: local-route-verification
checks.evidence: Production build served locally on port 3022: /species, /encyclopedia, and /media-intelligence returned 200 and rendered 64-78 Blob host mentions per page.

checks.name: blob-delivery
checks.evidence: Sampled Vercel Blob object HEAD requests for basking shark, blue whale, and California sea lion returned HTTP 200 with image/jpeg content.

checks.name: public-safety
checks.evidence: Served public routes were scanned for review-only candidate markers, candidate file-page fields, and candidate direct-file patterns; no forbidden markers were found.

checks.name: export-inspection
checks.evidence: Chrome headless screenshots were captured for desktop/mobile encyclopedia, /encyclopedia alias, and media intelligence storage coverage.

checks.name: visual-qa
checks.evidence: Desktop and mobile screenshots show animal images, stats, controls, and route text rendering without overlap; a mobile text overflow was found and fixed before final screenshots.

checks.name: official-domain-readiness
checks.evidence: Vercel project domains were inspected and the architecture runbook records the blocker: bluelifecommons.org is not currently owned/verified, so purchase or DNS control is required before official-domain production.

score.notes: Strong product surface, real hosted imagery, production build, visual QA, and source-safety checks. Remaining score is reserved for official-domain purchase/verification and future transformed image variants.

known_risks: Official domain cannot be attached until bluelifecommons.org is purchased or DNS control is provided.
The current Blob pass uploads approved originals; card, hero, open-graph, and thumbnail derivatives remain the next optimization pass.
Future animal expansion still needs sourced species content, media rights review, approval records, and public-route safety checks before images render.
npm audit reports two moderate advisories inherited through Next's nested postcss dependency; the offered audit fix is a major downgrade path and was not applied.
